PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-15-2012 Continued To Sep-26-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lauren Gardner for and with Aprille Rafidison.

Ms. Gardner stated that they are withdrawing their request to waive bond, explained the circumstances with the property and urgency, the medical condition of the Decedent's Brother and how they located the copy of the will. The Court stated that no evidence was provided to show that the Decedent did not intend to revoke the original will and that they needed to start all over if they are intending to proceed intestate. The Petition for Probate of Will was continued to September 26, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Ms. Gardner to file an amended petition.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-18-2012 Continued To Aug-15-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
